integration_config.title: Home Setup
integration_config.description: Welcome to Universal Room Automation! Let's set up your whole-home sensors and default notification preferences. These settings will be shared across all rooms.

data_description.outside_temp_sensor: Sensor for outdoor temperature (used for HVAC predictions)
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity for forecasts and predictions
data_description.solar_production_sensor: Current solar production for energy calculations
data_description.electricity_rate: Cost per kWh for energy cost calculations
data_description.notification_target: Device or group to receive notifications
data_description.notification_level: Which alerts to send: Off, Errors, Important, or All

energy_setup.title: Energy Tracking Setup
energy_setup.description: Configure energy sensors for whole-house tracking and predictions. These enable energy forecasts, cost predictions, and coverage analysis. All fields are optional - skip if you don't have these sensors.

data_description.solar_export_sensor: Energy sensor tracking kWh exported to grid (e.g., from Enphase)
data_description.grid_import_sensor: Primary grid import energy sensor (e.g., Enphase production meter)
data_description.grid_import_sensor_2: Secondary grid import sensor if you have multiple meters (optional)
data_description.battery_level_sensor: Battery state of charge percentage (e.g., Enphase battery)
data_description.whole_house_power_sensor: Real-time whole house power consumption in watts
data_description.whole_house_energy_sensor: Cumulative whole house energy usage in kWh
data_description.delivery_rate: Fixed transmission/delivery cost per kWh (added to electricity rate)
data_description.export_reimbursement_rate: Credit received per kWh exported to grid (net metering)

post_integration_setup.title: ✅ Home Setup Complete
post_integration_setup.description: Your home defaults are configured. Would you like to set up zones to group rooms, or skip and add rooms directly?

entry_type_select.title: Add New Entry
entry_type_select.description: What would you like to add to your home automation?

zone_setup.title: Zone Setup
zone_setup.description: Zones group rooms together for coordinated automation (e.g., 'Upstairs', 'Kids Area', 'Outdoor'). Rooms in a zone can share settings and appear in zone-level sensors.

data_description.zone_name: A short, unique name for this zone (e.g., 'Upstairs', 'Guest Suite')
data_description.zone_description: Optional description of what this zone covers
data_description.zone_rooms: Select existing rooms to include in this zone

room_setup.title: 🚪 Room Setup
room_setup.description: Configure the basic information for this room. The room type affects default timeout settings.

data_description.room_name: A friendly name for this room (e.g., 'Master Bedroom')
data_description.room_type: Type affects default timeout (bedrooms: 15 min, closets: 2 min)
data_description.area_id: Link to a Home Assistant area for device discovery
data_description.zone: Assign to a zone for grouped automation. Select existing or type new.
data_description.shared_space: Enable scheduled auto-off for common areas (living room, hallway)
data_description.shared_space_auto_off_hour: Hour (0-23) to turn off forgotten devices. 23 = 11 PM
data_description.shared_space_warning: Flash lights 5 minutes before auto-off as a warning
data_description.occupancy_timeout: Seconds after last motion before room is marked vacant

sensors.title: 📡 Presence & Environmental Sensors
sensors.description: Select sensors for occupancy detection and environmental monitoring. At least one occupancy sensor (motion, presence, or combined) is required.

data_description.motion_sensors: PIR sensors that detect movement (triggers occupancy)
data_description.presence_sensors: mmWave/radar sensors that detect presence without movement
data_description.scanner_areas: Only needed for sparse scanner homes. Select areas where BLE scanners are located that should map to this room. Leave empty if this room has its own scanner.
data_description.temperature_sensor: Room temperature for climate automation and alerts
data_description.humidity_sensor: Room humidity for fan control and comfort alerts
data_description.illuminance_sensor: Light level (lux) for 'turn on if dark' automation
data_description.door_sensor: Door open/closed sensor for security alerts
data_description.door_type: Interior doors vs. egress (exterior) doors have different alert thresholds
data_description.window_sensor: Window open/closed sensor for security alerts

devices.title: Devices to Automate
devices.description: Select the lights, fans, covers, and switches that should be automated based on room occupancy. Night light details and cover settings will be configured in follow-up steps if applicable.

data_description.lights: Lights to control on entry/exit (auto-detected from area if available)
data_description.light_capabilities: What your lights support: basic on/off, brightness, or full color (auto-detected)
data_description.night_lights: Select lights from above list to use as night lights during sleep hours
data_description.fans: Ceiling fans, floor fans, or switches for temperature-based cooling (fan.* or switch.*)
data_description.humidity_fans: Exhaust fans (fan.* or switch.* for RF/outlet-controlled fans)
data_description.auto_switches: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that turn on with occupancy and off when vacant
data_description.manual_switches: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that only turn off when vacant (not auto-on)
data_description.auto_devices: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that turn on with occupancy and off when vacant
data_description.manual_devices: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that only turn off when vacant (not auto-on)

night_light_detail.title: Night Light Settings
night_light_detail.description: Configure brightness and color temperature for night lights during sleep and daytime hours.

data_description.night_light_sleep_brightness: Brightness for night lights during sleep hours (dim for safety)
data_description.night_light_sleep_color: Color temperature during sleep hours (warm/red tones recommended)
data_description.night_light_day_brightness: Brightness for night lights outside sleep hours
data_description.night_light_day_color: Color temperature outside sleep hours (cool/white tones recommended)

cover_behavior.title: Cover Automation
cover_behavior.description: Configure how window covers/blinds respond to occupancy and time-of-day.

data_description.entry_cover_action: When to open covers on room entry
data_description.exit_cover_action: When to close covers on room exit
data_description.open_timing_mode: Control when covers are allowed to open
data_description.sunrise_offset: Minutes before/after sunrise for sun-based timing
data_description.timed_close_enabled: Automatically close covers at a specific time
data_description.sunset_offset: Minutes before/after sunset for sun-based timing

automation_behavior.title: Automation Behavior
automation_behavior.description: Configure how lights respond to occupancy changes.

data_description.entry_light_action: What to do with lights when someone enters the room
data_description.exit_light_action: What to do with lights when the room becomes vacant
data_description.illuminance_dark_threshold: Lux level below which the room is considered 'dark'
data_description.light_brightness_pct: Brightness level when turning lights on (1-100%)
data_description.light_transition_seconds_on: Fade-in time when turning lights on
data_description.light_transition_seconds_off: Fade-out time when turning lights off

climate.title: Climate & HVAC
climate.description: Configure temperature-based fan control and HVAC coordination. Fan speed thresholds will be configured in a follow-up step if fan control is enabled.

data_description.climate_entity: Your thermostat or HVAC controller (auto-detected from area if available)
data_description.hvac_coordination_enabled: Coordinate room automation with HVAC state
data_description.fan_control_enabled: Automatically control fans based on temperature (speed thresholds in next step)
data_description.fan_temp_threshold: Temperature above which fans turn on
data_description.humidity_fan_threshold: Humidity % above which exhaust fans turn on
data_description.humidity_fan_timeout: Seconds to run exhaust fan after humidity drops

fan_speeds.title: Fan Speed Thresholds
fan_speeds.description: Configure temperature thresholds for each fan speed level.

sleep_protection.title: Sleep Protection
sleep_protection.description: Prevent automation from disturbing sleep during nighttime hours.

data_description.sleep_protection_enabled: Block most automation during sleep hours
data_description.sleep_start_hour: Hour when sleep mode starts (0-23, e.g., 22 = 10 PM)
data_description.sleep_end_hour: Hour when sleep mode ends (0-23, e.g., 7 = 7 AM)
data_description.sleep_bypass_motion_count: Motion events needed to override sleep mode
data_description.sleep_block_covers: Prevent covers from opening during sleep hours

energy.title: Energy Monitoring
energy.description: Track energy usage and costs for devices in this room.

data_description.notify_daily_energy_summary: Send daily energy usage summary notification

notifications.title: Notifications & Alerts
notifications.description: Configure push notifications and visual alert lights for this room.

data_description.override_notifications: Use room-specific notification settings instead of home defaults
data_description.notification_level: Which alerts to send: Off, Errors, Important, or All
data_description.alert_lights: Lights to flash/change color for visual alerts
data_description.alert_light_color: Color to use for alert indication

error.no_occupancy_sensors: At least one occupancy sensor (motion, presence, or combined) is required
error.zone_name_exists: A zone with this name already exists
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please check logs for details.

abort.reconfigure_use_options: Use 'Configure' from the three-dot menu to modify settings.
abort.coordinator_not_ready: Coordinator setup is coming in a future update.
abort.coordinator_use_options: Domain coordinators are configured via the Coordinator Manager device. Click Configure on the Coordinator Manager entry.
abort.no_zones_configured: No zones have been configured yet. Add a zone from the integration setup first.
abort.zone_not_found: The selected zone could not be found. It may have been deleted.
abort.zone_added: Zone added successfully. The Zone Manager will reload to apply changes.

manage_zones.title: 🗂️ Manage Zones
manage_zones.description: Select a zone to configure its settings.

zone_config_menu.title: Zone Configuration
zone_config_menu.description: What would you like to configure for this zone?

zone_hvac.title: 🌡️ Zone HVAC
zone_hvac.description: Select the thermostat that controls this zone. If not set, falls back to the first room's thermostat.

data_description.zone_thermostat: Climate entity to control for this zone

global_sensors.title: Global Sensors
global_sensors.description: Update sensors shared across all rooms.

data_description.electricity_rate: Cost per kWh for energy calculations

energy_sensors.title: Energy Sensors
energy_sensors.description: Configure energy sensors for whole-house tracking and predictions.

data_description.solar_export_sensor: Energy sensor tracking kWh exported to grid
data_description.whole_house_power_sensor: Real-time whole house power in watts
data_description.whole_house_energy_sensor: Cumulative whole house energy in kWh

default_notifications.title: Default Notifications
default_notifications.description: Update default notification settings. Rooms can override these.

data_description.notification_level: Which alerts to send by default

person_tracking.title: 👥 Person Tracking
person_tracking.description: Configure which people to track and how transitions are detected.

data_description.tracked_persons: Select person entities to track room-to-room movement
data_description.person_data_retention: How long to keep transition history (0 = forever)
data_description.transition_detection_window: Seconds to wait before confirming a room transition

camera_census.title: 📷 Camera Census
camera_census.description: Set up cameras for person counting. Pick any camera entity — person detection sensors are found automatically. Works with UniFi Protect, Frigate, Reolink, and Dahua.

data_description.census_cross_validation: When you run multiple camera platforms (e.g., Frigate and UniFi Protect), person counts are compared between them for higher accuracy. Turn this off if you only use one camera platform or prefer simpler, single-source counting.
data_description.camera_person_entities: Select cameras inside your home. Each camera is automatically mapped to a room using its area assignment in Home Assistant. Works with UniFi Protect, Frigate, Reolink, and Dahua.
data_description.egress_cameras: Cameras at your exterior doors (front door, back door, garage). Used to track who enters and leaves — not used for room occupancy. Deliveries and visitors at the door won't trigger room automation.
data_description.perimeter_cameras: Cameras covering your yard, driveway, or fence line. Used to count people on your property who are outside the house.
data_description.face_recognition_enabled: When enabled, face recognition data from camera events is used to confirm the identity of persons during transit validation. Requires a camera integration that provides face recognition. Defaults to off — path validation works without it.
data_description.enhanced_census: Enable event-driven sensor fusion with hold/decay, WiFi guest VLAN detection, and Frigate face recognition differentiation. Separates 'people seen' from 'people recognized' for better guest detection.
data_description.guest_vlan_ssid: SSID of your guest WiFi network (e.g., 'Revel'). Phones connected to this SSID are counted as guests. Leave blank to disable WiFi guest detection.
data_description.census_hold_interior: How long (in minutes) to hold the peak person count for indoor cameras before starting decay. Prevents count drops when people move between rooms or sit in camera blind spots. Default: 15 minutes.
data_description.census_hold_exterior: How long (in minutes) to hold the peak person count for outdoor/perimeter cameras before dropping. Shorter than interior because outdoor detections are more transient. Default: 5 minutes.

perimeter_alerting.title: 🚨 Perimeter Alerting
perimeter_alerting.description: Send notifications when a person is detected on your perimeter cameras during quiet hours. Requires at least one perimeter camera to be configured in Camera Census.

data_description.perimeter_alert_hours_start: Alert monitoring starts at this hour (0–23). Default: 11 PM (23). Overnight ranges are supported — e.g. start 23, end 5 alerts from 11 PM to 5 AM.
data_description.perimeter_alert_hours_end: Alert monitoring ends at this hour (0–23). Wraps overnight when end is before start. Default: 5 AM.
data_description.perimeter_alert_notify_service: Notification service to call when a person is detected on your perimeter (e.g., notify.mobile_app_john). Leave blank to disable notifications.
data_description.perimeter_alert_notify_target: Notification target (optional — leave blank to use the service default).

domain_coordinators.title: 🤖 Domain Coordinators
domain_coordinators.description: Enable the domain coordinator system for whole-house intelligence. When enabled, a Coordinator Manager device is created and house-level coordination becomes available. Individual coordinators (Presence, Safety, Security, Energy, HVAC, Comfort) are configured in later updates.

data_description.domain_coordinators_enabled: Turn on to activate the domain coordinator framework. Creates the Coordinator Manager device, house state tracking, and decision logging. Requires integration reload.

coordinator_presence.title: 👥 Presence Settings
coordinator_presence.description: Configure the Presence Coordinator. Sleep hours determine when the house transitions to sleep/waking states. Geofence trackers detect arrivals and departures.

data_description.sleep_start_hour: Hour (0–23) when the house enters sleep mode. Default: 23 (11 PM).
data_description.sleep_end_hour: Hour (0–23) when the house exits sleep mode. Default: 6 (6 AM).
data_description.geofence_entities: Device tracker entities used for geofence-based arrival/departure detection. Select person device trackers that report home/not_home zones.

coordinator_safety.title: 🛡️ Safety Monitoring
coordinator_safety.description: Configure the Safety Coordinator. The water shutoff valve is activated automatically on water leak detection. Emergency lights are set to 100% brightness during evacuations.

data.global_aq_sensors: Global Air Quality Sensors (CO, CO₂, VOC)

data_description.water_shutoff_valve: Optional valve entity to close automatically on water leak detection (HIGH severity or above). Leave empty if no shutoff valve is installed — you can add one later.
data_description.emergency_light_entities: Lights to set to 100% brightness during fire/CO evacuations. Select lights along evacuation routes (hallways, stairways, exits).
data_description.global_smoke_sensors: Smoke/gas detectors not assigned to any URA room. These are monitored globally by the Safety Coordinator.
data_description.global_leak_sensors: Water leak sensors not assigned to any URA room (e.g., utility chase, water main).
data_description.global_aq_sensors: Air quality sensors (CO, CO₂, VOC) not assigned to any URA room.
data_description.global_temp_sensors: Temperature sensors not assigned to any URA room (e.g., attic, crawl space).
data_description.global_humidity_sensors: Humidity sensors not assigned to any URA room.

coordinator_security.title: 🔒 Security
coordinator_security.description: Configure the Security Coordinator. Manages armed states, entry monitoring, lock control, and security camera triggers. All devices are manually configured — no auto-discovery.

data_description.security_lock_entities: Door locks to control during security events and periodic lock checks. Must be manually selected.
data_description.security_garage_entities: Garage doors and automated egress points. Treated as locks for periodic check and lockdown.
data_description.security_entry_sensors: Door/window binary sensors to monitor for entry events.
data_description.security_light_entities: Lights to activate at full brightness during security alerts. Must be manually selected.
data_description.security_camera_entities: Cameras for recording triggers during security events. Only used when recording is enabled.
data_description.security_camera_recording: Enable camera recording triggers during alerts. Disabled by default — cameras are assumed to be on continuous recording.
data_description.security_camera_record_duration: Duration in seconds for camera recording triggers.
data_description.security_alarm_panel: Optional alarm panel entity for bidirectional armed state sync. Leave empty to manage armed state independently.
data_description.security_auto_follow: Automatically set armed state based on house state (away → armed_away, home → armed_home). Off by default.
data_description.security_lock_check_interval: Minutes between periodic lock compliance checks. Runs regardless of armed state.

coordinator_energy.title: ⚡ Energy Coordinator
coordinator_energy.description: Configure the Energy Coordinator. Manages battery strategy, pool/EV optimization, TOU-aware cost tracking, and daily forecasting via Enphase Envoy and Solcast.

data_description.energy_reserve_soc: Minimum battery reserve percentage. Battery won't discharge below this level during normal operation. Default: 20%.
data_description.energy_bill_cycle_day: Day of the month your PEC billing cycle starts. Used for cost tracking and bill prediction. Default: 23.
data_description.energy_decision_interval: Minutes between energy decision cycles. Controls how often battery strategy, pool speed, and EV charging are evaluated. Default: 5.
data_description.energy_weather_entity: Weather entity for temperature-based consumption prediction. Inherits from house settings if not set here.
data_description.energy_evse_a_entity: Power sensor for Garage A EV charger (e.g., Emporia WiFi). Used to track EV charging load.
data_description.energy_evse_b_entity: Power sensor for Garage B EV charger. Used to track EV charging load.
data_description.energy_l1_charger_entities: Smart plug switches used as L1 chargers. Binary charge status derived from switch state (no power sensor needed).
data_description.energy_solar_classification_mode: Automatic uses monthly percentile thresholds from your production history. Custom lets you set fixed kWh thresholds year-round.
data_description.energy_solar_threshold_excellent: Custom mode: forecast above this = excellent day. Only used when Solar Day Classification is set to Custom.
data_description.energy_solar_threshold_good: Custom mode: forecast above this = good day. Only used when Solar Day Classification is set to Custom.
data_description.energy_solar_threshold_moderate: Custom mode: forecast above this = moderate day. Only used when Solar Day Classification is set to Custom.
data_description.energy_solar_threshold_poor: Custom mode: forecast above this = poor day. Below this = very poor. Only used when Solar Day Classification is set to Custom.

coordinator_hvac.title: 🌡️ HVAC Coordinator
coordinator_hvac.description: Configure the HVAC Coordinator. Manages zone presets, override detection, fan control, cover solar gain management, and predictive pre-conditioning.

data_description.hvac_max_sleep_offset: Maximum temperature adjustment during sleep preset. Cooling setpoint raised by this amount. Default: 1.5°F.
data_description.hvac_compromise_minutes: How long to hold the compromise setpoint before reverting a normal override. Default: 30 minutes.
data_description.hvac_ac_reset_timeout: Minutes a zone must be stuck past setpoint before triggering an AC reset cycle. Default: 10 minutes.
data_description.hvac_fan_activation_delta: Temperature above cooling setpoint that activates fans. Default: 2.0°F.
data_description.hvac_fan_hysteresis: Hysteresis band for fan deactivation. Fans turn off when delta drops to (activation - hysteresis). Default: 1.5°F.
data_description.hvac_fan_min_runtime: Minimum fan runtime once activated, preventing short cycling. Default: 10 minutes.
data_description.hvac_cover_entities: Explicit list of cover entities for solar gain management. If empty, covers are auto-discovered from room entries.

coordinator_music_following.title: 🎵 Music Following
coordinator_music_following.description: Configure the Music Following Coordinator. Controls how music transfers when a person moves between rooms. Adjust timing parameters to tune transfer behavior for your speaker setup.

data_description.mf_cooldown_seconds: Minimum seconds between transfers to the same target room per person. Prevents rapid repeated transfers. Default: 8.
data_description.mf_ping_pong_window: Seconds within which an A-to-B-to-A transition is suppressed as ping-pong. Default: 60.
data_description.mf_verify_delay: Seconds to wait after transfer before verifying the target speaker is playing. Default: 2.
data_description.mf_unjoin_delay: Seconds to wait before unjoining the source speaker from a group after transfer. Default: 5.
data_description.mf_position_offset: Seconds to add to the media position when resuming on the target speaker, to account for transfer delay. Default: 3.
data_description.mf_min_confidence: Minimum transition confidence (0.1-1.0) required to trigger a music transfer. Lower values transfer more aggressively. Default: 0.6.
data_description.mf_high_confidence_distance: Maximum BLE distance (feet) from closest area scanner to trigger music transfer. Tighter than person tracking default (10ft) to avoid transfers on BLE bleed-through from adjacent rooms. Default: 8.

coordinator_notifications.title: 🔔 Notification Channels
coordinator_notifications.description: Configure notification channels. Enable channels and set minimum severity thresholds for each. CRITICAL alerts always bypass quiet hours and severity filters.

data_description.nm_pushover_severity: Minimum severity to trigger Pushover. Default: MEDIUM.
data_description.nm_pushover_service: HA notify service for Pushover (e.g., notify.pushover).
data_description.nm_companion_enabled: Enable HA Companion App push notifications with action buttons.
data_description.nm_companion_severity: Minimum severity to trigger Companion App. Default: HIGH.
data_description.nm_whatsapp_severity: Minimum severity to trigger WhatsApp. Default: HIGH.
data_description.nm_imessage_enabled: Enable iMessage notifications via BlueBubbles. Requires BlueBubbles server and HA integration.
data_description.nm_imessage_severity: Minimum severity to trigger iMessage. Default: HIGH.
data_description.nm_tts_severity: Minimum severity to trigger TTS. Default: CRITICAL.
data_description.nm_tts_speakers: Media player entities for TTS announcements.
data_description.nm_lights_enabled: Enable alert light patterns during hazards.
data_description.nm_lights_severity: Minimum severity to trigger alert lights. Default: HIGH.
data_description.nm_alert_lights: Light entities to use for alert patterns (flash, pulse, etc.).

coordinator_notifications_persons.title: 👤 Notification Persons
coordinator_notifications_persons.description: Configure per-person notification settings. Each person can have their own channel credentials and delivery preferences. Submit once per person.

data_description.nm_person_entity: Select a person to configure notifications for.
data_description.nm_person_pushover_key: Pushover user key for this person (leave empty if not using Pushover).
data_description.nm_person_pushover_device: Device name as shown in your Pushover app (Settings > Devices). Leave empty to send to all devices.
data_description.nm_person_companion_service: HA Companion App notify service (e.g., notify.mobile_app_phone). Leave empty if not using.
data_description.nm_person_whatsapp_phone: WhatsApp phone number with country code (e.g., +1234567890). Leave empty if not using.
data_description.nm_person_imessage_handle: Apple ID email or phone number for iMessage (e.g., user@icloud.com or +15551234567). Leave empty if not using.
data_description.nm_person_delivery_pref: How LOW and MEDIUM alerts are delivered. Immediate: each individually. Daily Digest: batched summary. Off: suppressed. CRITICAL/HIGH are always immediate.
data_description.nm_person_digest_morning: Time for morning digest delivery. Default: 08:00.
data_description.nm_person_digest_evening_enabled: Enable a second digest delivery in the evening.
data_description.nm_person_digest_evening: Time for evening digest delivery. Default: 18:00.

coordinator_notifications_quiet.title: 🌙 Quiet Hours & Safe Word
coordinator_notifications_quiet.description: Configure quiet hours and the safe word for acknowledging CRITICAL alerts via text reply.

data_description.nm_quiet_use_house_state: When enabled, quiet hours activate automatically when house state is SLEEP or HOME_NIGHT. Disable to use manual time window.
data_description.nm_quiet_manual_start: Start time for manual quiet hours (used when house state mode is off).
data_description.nm_quiet_manual_end: End time for manual quiet hours.
data_description.nm_safe_word: A shared household secret word (min 4 chars) required to acknowledge CRITICAL alerts via text reply. Never sent in notifications.
data_description.nm_silence_duration: How long 'silence' command suppresses non-CRITICAL alerts. Default: 30 minutes.

coordinator_notifications_cooldowns.title: ⏱️ Post-Acknowledge Cooldowns
coordinator_notifications_cooldowns.description: Configure how long to wait after acknowledging a CRITICAL alert before re-evaluating whether the hazard is still active. If still active, the alert re-fires.

data_description.nm_cooldown_smoke: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a smoke/fire alert. Default: 2.
data_description.nm_cooldown_co: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a CO alert. Default: 2.
data_description.nm_cooldown_flooding: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a flooding alert. Default: 5.
data_description.nm_cooldown_water_leak: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a water leak alert. Default: 10.
data_description.nm_cooldown_freeze: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a freeze risk alert. Default: 15.
data_description.nm_cooldown_intrusion: Minutes before re-checking after acknowledging a security intrusion alert. Default: 3.
data_description.nm_cooldown_default: Default cooldown for unspecified hazard types. Default: 10.

coordinator_toggles.title: ⚙️ Enable/Disable Coordinators
coordinator_toggles.description: Toggle individual coordinators on or off. Disabled coordinators stop processing but retain their configuration and entities. Re-enabling takes effect on next reload.

data_description.presence_coordinator_enabled: Track house occupancy, infer house state (home/away/sleep), and manage zone presence modes.
data_description.safety_coordinator_enabled: Monitor environmental hazards (smoke, CO, water leaks, temperature extremes, humidity) and trigger emergency responses.
data_description.security_coordinator_enabled: Manage armed states, entry monitoring, lock control, and security camera triggers.

zone_rooms.title: Zone Configuration
zone_rooms.description: Update zone name and which rooms belong to this zone.

zone_media.title: 🎵 Zone Media
zone_media.description: Configure how music follows people within this zone.

data_description.zone_player_entity: Primary media player for this zone (e.g., Sonos group)
data_description.zone_player_mode: How to handle music when zone player unavailable

basic_setup.title: 🚪 Room Setup
basic_setup.description: Update room name, type, and basic settings.

data_description.room_name: A friendly name for this room
data_description.room_type: Room type affects default timeout settings
data_description.area_id: Link to a Home Assistant area
data_description.shared_space: Enable scheduled auto-off for common areas
data_description.occupancy_timeout: Seconds until room is marked vacant

data_description.scanner_areas: For sparse scanner homes only. Select areas with BLE scanners that should map to this room.

data_description.humidity_fans: Exhaust fans (fan.* or switch.* for RF fans)
data_description.auto_switches: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that auto-on and off
data_description.manual_switches: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that only auto-off
data_description.auto_devices: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that auto-on and off
data_description.manual_devices: Devices (lights, fans, switches, input_booleans) that only auto-off

automation_chaining.title: 🔗 Automation Chaining
automation_chaining.description: Bind existing HA automations to room triggers. These run after URA's built-in automation.

data_description.chain_enter: HA automation to trigger when the room becomes occupied
data_description.chain_exit: HA automation to trigger when the room becomes vacant
data_description.chain_lux_dark: HA automation to trigger when lux drops below 50
data_description.chain_lux_bright: HA automation to trigger when lux rises above 200

music_following.title: 🎵 Music Following
music_following.description: Configure how music follows you into this room.

data_description.music_following_enabled: Automatically transfer music when you enter this room
data_description.room_media_player: Primary media player for this room

notifications.title: Notifications & Alerts
notifications.description: Update notification settings for this room.

abort.no_zones_configured: No zones have been configured yet. Add a zone from the integration setup first.
abort.zone_not_found: The selected zone could not be found. It may have been deleted.
